phase.name: Set Lifecycle
successCriteria: /set-init creates a git worktree and branch for a specified set, ready for independent development
/set-init generates a scoped CLAUDE.md per worktree containing only relevant contracts, context, and style guide
A set planner runs during /set-init, producing a high-level set overview that guides wave planning
/status displays a cross-set dashboard showing the set > wave > job hierarchy with current state for each
/pause saves per-set state with a handoff file for later resumption, and /cleanup removes completed worktrees with safety checks
AskUserQuestion is used at every decision gate during set lifecycle commands, with queries batched to save tokens

signals: Skills directory with SKILL.md files (Claude Code plugin)
